phase_statuses.title: Add doc-login coverage and wire into doc batch runner
phase_statuses.objective: Ensure the doc E2E batch run includes a complete login flow spec and fails fast when manifest wiring is missing.
phase_statuses.evidence_expectation: A doc E2E report entry lists the login spec and shows pass results.
phase_statuses.notes: - Implementation completed; overall doc batch remains red due unrelated pre-existing doc spec failures documented in execution-log.md.

acceptance_criteria.text: A doc E2E login spec exists under `fronted/e2e/tests/docs*.spec.js` that validates a successful UI login using the real doc bootstrap account(s).
The doc login spec validates at least one failure path with user-visible error messaging (for example wrong password or disabled account) using the real doc E2E runtime.
`doc/e2e/manifest.json` exists and includes the login spec so `鏂囨。E2E鑷姩娴嬭瘯.bat` runs it via `scripts/run_doc_e2e.py`.

phase_statuses.title: Align shared doc E2E helpers and specs with current response envelopes
phase_statuses.objective: Remove stale test assumptions about top-level `request_id`, `user_id`, `group_id`, and folder ids so doc specs assert against the real current backend envelopes.
phase_statuses.evidence_expectation: Grouped Playwright runs covering the affected specs pass without modifying production API contracts.

acceptance_criteria.text: Doc upload, browser, global-search, chat, knowledge-base, and role-scope specs extract approval request ids from the current `OperationApprovalRequestEnvelope` shape and pass targeted browser validation.
Doc user-management, password-change, and tools specs extract created user ids from the current `UserEnvelope` shape and pass targeted browser validation.
Doc permission-groups, role-permission-menu, and tools specs extract permission-group ids and folder ids from the current `result` or `folder` envelopes and pass targeted browser validation.

phase_statuses.title: Fix assertion-specific doc specs to match current seeded runtime behavior
phase_statuses.objective: Update doc specs whose failures are not envelope-related, but instead depend on current action response nesting or seeded initial settings.
phase_statuses.evidence_expectation: Targeted Playwright runs for the assertion-specific specs pass with current bootstrap data.

acceptance_criteria.text: `docs.approval-center.spec.js` asserts withdraw success against the current approval action envelope and passes targeted browser validation.
`docs.notification-settings.spec.js` matches the current seeded notification rule defaults and still validates save, retry, and dispatch behavior in the real browser runtime.

phase_statuses.title: Restore full doc batch fidelity and verify the complete documentation run
phase_statuses.objective: Ensure the batch command reports the real suite result without false failures caused by per-spec runner churn, then verify the whole manifest passes.
phase_statuses.evidence_expectation: Latest doc batch report plus full-run command output captured in `execution-log.md` and `test-report.md`.

acceptance_criteria.text: `python scripts/run_doc_e2e.py --repo-root D:\ProjectPackage\RagflowAuth` completes with exit code 0 and produces a PASS report.
`doc/test/reports/doc_e2e_report_latest.md` lists the full manifest and marks every doc spec PASS, without false failures caused by batch-runner port or process churn.
